metadata.user_query:
gNB-CU has to prepare and send F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU and candidate gNB-DU has to respond with F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message and this message has to be handled on gNB-CU for Inter-gNB DU LTM Handover Procedure
Target message: UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE (Requested Target Cell ID)
